title: JSA assists South India electronics retailer Sathya as it heads for ₹600 crore IPO
description: Sathya Agencies Limited has proposed an initial public offering aggregating up to ₹600 crore, comprising a fresh issue of equity shares of up to ₹300 crore and an offer for sale aggregating up to ₹300 crore.JSA Advocates & Solicitors is advising Sathya on this IPO.The transaction team is led by Arka Mookerjee (Partner), along with Pracheta Bhattacharya (Partner), and Ananth Balaji (Partner), with support from Associates Shreya Sharma, Palak Karundia, Prateek Khandelwal, Ritu R Jaiswal,
